obligations.rule: Default behavior: validate standard FQDNs with TLDs, no underscores, no trailing dots, no numeric TLDs, no wildcards, and enforce max length.
obligations.why: Baseline behavior without options reflects the default validator configuration.

obligations.rule: Option `require_tld: false`: allow domains without TLDs.
obligations.why: Requirement explicitly documents this option as disabling TLD validation.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_underscores: true`: allow underscores in domain names.
obligations.why: Requirement explicitly documents this option as enabling underscores.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_trailing_dot: true`: allow domains ending with a trailing dot.
obligations.why: Requirement explicitly documents this option as enabling trailing dots.
Requirement explicitly documents this option as enabling numeric TLDs.

obligations.rule: Option `allow_wildcard: true`: allow domains starting with `*.`.
obligations.why: Requirement explicitly documents this option as enabling wildcard domains.

obligations.rule: Option `ignore_max_length: true`: allow domains exceeding the standard max length.
obligations.why: Requirement explicitly documents this option as disabling max length validation.

test_groups.title: Default behavior validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the default behavior of the validator with no options provided. Ensures standard FQDN rules are enforced.

test_groups.title: Allow domains without TLDs
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when `require_tld` is set to false, allowing domains without TLDs.

test_groups.title: Allow underscores in domain names
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when `allow_underscores` is set to true, allowing underscores in domain names.

test_groups.title: Allow trailing dots in domain names
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when `allow_trailing_dot` is set to true, allowing domains to end with a trailing dot.

test_groups.title: Allow numeric-only TLDs
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when `allow_numeric_tld` is set to true, allowing numeric-only TLDs.

test_groups.title: Allow wildcard domains
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when `allow_wildcard` is set to true, allowing domains starting with `*.`.

test_groups.title: Ignore max length validation
test_groups.rationale: Tests the behavior when `ignore_max_length` is set to true, allowing domains exceeding the standard max length.
